summary: First-iteration full review of Wave (WhatsApp clone). Backend: 16/16 pytest tests PASSED including auth (send-otp, verify-otp, /me, profile), users list, 1-on-1 idempotent chat, group chat, list chats with display_name/last_message/unread, send/get text+image+voice messages, 404 on unauthorized chat access, AI start-chat (idempotent), AI Claude reply within ~7s using EMERGENT_LLM_KEY, and WebSocket /api/ws delivering new_message + typing broadcasts. No '_id' present in any MongoDB-derived response. Frontend (mobile 390x844): Welcome screen renders with Wave branding/wave illustration/three feature rows + Get started; Phone screen accepts +1 country code + phone, posts OTP and navigates to OTP; OTP screen shows 'Dev OTP: <code>' banner with Autofill; Autofill+Verify proceed to Profile setup screen for new users. Profile-setup, Chats AI list, AI message UI reply, and Settings sign-out flows could not be fully reached in a single Playwright run because Verify/Continue/Send/Settings tab buttons (Pressable) lack stable testIDs (selector flaky across runs). Backend evidence + partial UI evidence indicates the flow is functional end-to-end.

issues: Console warnings: 'shadow*' style props deprecated (use boxShadow); props.pointerEvents deprecated (use style.pointerEvents); Image style.resizeMode deprecated (use props.resizeMode). Cosmetic only.

react_native_issues.component: Pressable buttons (Verify / Continue / Send / Tab bar / Sign out / Wave AI row / new-chat / new-group)
react_native_issues.issue: Missing testID props. This made automated UI testing flaky (had to fall back to text matching which collided with other 'verify'/'Continue' substrings). Add testIDs: get-started-btn, phone-input, send-otp-btn, otp-input, autofill-btn, verify-otp-btn, name-input, profile-continue-btn, tab-chats, tab-calls, tab-settings, new-chat-btn, new-group-btn, chat-row-{id}, message-input, send-msg-btn, sign-out-btn.

action_items: Add testID props to all interactive elements (list above) so automated UI E2E can run reliably.

Optional: align expo package versions (expo-audio 1.1.1, expo-file-system 19.0.22, expo-image-picker 17.0.11, @react-native-async-storage/async-storage 2.2.0) per Expo SDK 54 expectations to avoid runtime warnings.
Optional: replace deprecated style props (shadow*, pointerEvents prop, Image style.resizeMode) to silence warnings.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is single-file but well-scoped (~440 lines) — acceptable for MVP; consider splitting if it grows beyond ~700 lines.
All Mongo queries correctly project {'_id': 0} or pop _id — verified by tests.
WS endpoint registered on app (not api_router) at path '/api/ws' — works correctly through ingress.

AI reply built with prior-message context but it does not strip the user's just-sent message from prior list before appending it explicitly; minor but causes the latest user message to appear twice in prompt context — non-blocking.

success_rate.frontend: ~60% (welcome/phone/OTP/profile-setup screens verified rendering & navigation; chat-list, AI-chat UI message round-trip, and settings sign-out NOT verified via UI in this run due to missing testIDs)

seed_data_creation: Created several disposable test users (+1555*, +1666*, +1777*) via /api/auth/verify-otp and one TEST_Group chat; can be cleaned up by dropping wave_chat.users / chats / messages collections if needed.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend is solid — re-run /app/backend/tests/test_wave_backend.py for regression. For UI, after main agent adds testIDs, write Playwright targeting [data-testid=...]; mobile viewport 390x844; goto with wait_until='domcontentloaded' (networkidle never settles due to Metro WS); first screen wait ~8s. Use any +1555xxxxxxx phone, then Autofill→Verify→fill name→Continue→tap 'Wave AI'→type→send→wait ~12s for Claude reply.
rca_of_issue: N/A — no functional bugs found. Only test-automation friction due to missing testIDs.
